query: SELECT id, quotationNumber, versionNumber, baseQuotationId, parentQuotationId, status, isAdditional FROM quotations WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%V3%' OR quotationNumber LIKE '%v3%' OR versionNumber >= 3 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
